title: Logically Optimized
description:
(1.19.4-26.2)

Introducing Logically Optimized!

A lightweight performance modpack for vanilla-style Minecraft with faster loading, smoother gameplay, shader support, and essential QoL features.
body:
![Logically Optimized](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0b5a7a3f830ff8497e6cb98600f1ce324c896de.png)
# Introducing Logically Optimized!

The Minecraft modpack includes everything you need! Enjoy smooth and enjoyable gameplay that keeps you engaged, extremely quick loading times. This modpack is for overall performance but also adds shader support, zooming features, adding resource packs, and shaders without quitting while you're playing the game (Use best versions of the modpack to get the best of it)

## You can use it in any world, any server!

Logically Optimized: It doesn't add extra content to the game, ensuring compatibility with nearly any world or server.

## Performance

Logically Optimized is faster than other modpacks because it includes modern performance mods like Sodium and Lithium. And optimized the config file. These mods are safe to use in your worlds and can significantly improve speed on any device.

### More than 300 FPS In RTX Laptop/PC (the RTX 30-50 series laptops/PCs can get guaranteed over 500 FPS)

### 150+ FPS In GTX Laptop/PC (maybe some of them are worse than that, and some of them are actually better than that a lot by getting over guaranteed 300 FPS)

## OptiFine Features

Logically Optimized supports most OptiFine features, such as shaders, connected textures, and zoom!

## Up to date

Logically Optimized receives quick updates and is one of the first modpacks to upgrade to newer versions of Minecraft. 
Updating the modpack is simple and will retain your mod settings whenever possible.

## Installation!

> 1. Add the mods in the "/mods" folder.
> 2. Put the config file in the ".minecraft/config" folder.
> 3. Enjoy the game

Note: it's important to add options.txt; it gives you a better performance than what you think.

### You need to remove the following mods below if you're using the Lunar client:

- **1. Modernfix.**
- **2. C2ME.**
- **3. ImmediatelyFast.**

**Feather client doesn't need to remove any mod from the modpack EXCEPT Noisium**
**labymod, and other client launchers, you need to remove some mods to work.**

# Need Support or having Issues?

Join our [Logically Optimized](https://discord.gg/fzPF32xUFy) discord server to chat, get help!
